news.t: Harbor Capital Advisors Expands Growing ETF Lineup with the Harbor Emerging Markets Select ETF and Extends Partnership with C WorldWide Asset Management

holdings.infoBox: EMES is an equity ETF with a total of 60 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics Co Ltd Participating Preferred stock at 12.15%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 11.16%, SK hynix at 7.96%, Tencent Holdings at 3.77%, and Us Dollar at 2.75%.

overview.description: The Harbor Emerging Markets Select ETF (EMES) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Emerging Markets index. The fund is actively managed, focusing on long-term capital growth by investing primarily in companies tied to emerging markets. The fund selects market leaders driven by diverse growth themes, emphasizing governance and sustainable practices EMES was launched on May 14, 2025 and is issued by Harbor.

data.title: Harbor Capital Advisors Expands Growing ETF Lineup with the Harbor Emerging Markets Select ETF and Extends Partnership with C WorldWide Asset Management
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Harbor Capital Advisors, Inc. ("Harbor"), an asset manager that curates a suite of actively managed ETFs, collective investment trusts, and mutual funds is excited to announc...
